mapper.select: select count(*) from department where com_id = #{comId}

WITH RECURSIVE dept_path AS ( SELECT dept_id AS ancestor_id, dept_id AS descendant_id, dept_id AS root_id FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} UNION ALL SELECT dp.ancestor_id, d.dept_id, dp.root_id FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.parent_id = dp.descendant_id ), dept_order AS ( SELECT dept_id, parent_id, CAST(LPAD(dept_id, 5, '0') AS CHAR(255)) AS sort_path FROM department WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND com_id = #{comId} UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_id, d.parent_id, CONCAT(o.sort_path, '-', LPAD(d.dept_id, 5, '0')) FROM department d JOIN dept_order o ON d.parent_id = o.dept_id ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.parent_id AS parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name AS parent_name, d.emp_id AS leader_id, leader.emp_name AS leader_name, COUNT(e.emp_id) AS empCount FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = dp.ancestor_id JOIN dept_order o ON o.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN department dp_parent ON dp_parent.dept_id = d.parent_id LEFT JOIN employee leader ON leader.emp_id = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.dept_id = dp.descendant_id GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name, d.emp_id, leader.emp_name, o.sort_path ORDER BY o.sort_path
select coalesce(max(sort_order), 0) from department where com_id = #{comId} and (parent_id = #{parentId} OR (parent_id IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
select count(*) from department where parent_id = #{deptId}

with recursive childTree as ( select dept_id from department where parent_id = #{deptId} union all select d.dept_id from department d join childTree c on d.parent_id = c.dept_id ) select dept_id from childTree

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId}) AS deptTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth = 0) AS dept0Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth = 1) AS dept1Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND emp_status = '재직') AS empTotal
